prompt: Post the message 'deploy finished' to the Slack channel #releases.
Open a GitHub issue titled 'Login button broken on Safari' in acme/web.

Create a Notion page titled 'Q2 retro' under parent page id 'abc123'.
Run the SQL query 'SELECT count(*) FROM users' against the analytics database.
Let the team know in chat that the staging deploy is done.

Get the recent crash reports for the mobile app.
Schedule a 30-minute meeting with bob@example.com on Friday at 2pm.
Show me the API request rate for the last hour.
Find every place in our code that imports the deprecated 'oldAuth' module.

_note: At high N the catalog also contains stripe_get_subscription, stripe_update_subscription, stripe_list_subscription, stripe_delete_subscription, stripe_export_subscription, stripe_import_subscription, stripe_search_subscription. Tests CRUD-collision disambiguation.

prompt: Update the email address on Stripe customer cus_99 to new@example.com.
_note: Stripe has account/user/record CRUD at high N. Tests resource-name disambiguation: account vs user vs record.

prompt: Pull the current invoice list from Shopify for store acme.
_note: At high N: shopify_get_invoice, shopify_list_invoice, shopify_search_invoice, shopify_export_invoice. Tests action verb disambiguation: list vs get vs search.

prompt: Delete the abandoned PagerDuty alert with id alert_1234.
_note: At high N: pagerduty has CRUD on alert/event/job. Tests verb+resource collision.

prompt: Create a Stripe webhook pointing at https://hooks.example.com/incoming for the live account.
_note: At high N: stripe has create/list/get/update/delete/search/export/import webhook plus the same set across shopify/twilio/pagerduty. Tests verb disambiguation under tight name collision.
